name: zsys_sub64
description: zSys::Sub64 subtracts one 64-bit high/low pair from another and writes high/low dword outputs.
known_limits: The native smoke verifies the borrow case 0x0000000100000000 - 1 -> 0x00000000ffffffff and the helper is now used by the CMOS benchmark path.
Binary-safe verification is still expected to fail until the helper is shaped as the original sub/sbb fastcall leaf.
